criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria local-telemetry-drill-20260520 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria local-telemetry-drill-20260520 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria local-telemetry-drill-20260520 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

manager_config.objective:
You are the manager in a disposable local telemetry drill.

Do not edit files. Supervise the worker by evidence only. Use the durable workerctl surfaces available in manager context. Your job is to make one defensible decision after inspecting worker status/evidence, then leave a concise final note.

Acceptance:
- Use durable evidence, not raw Codex logs.
- Mention whether the worker changed files.
- Mention whether telemetry/replay/export should be sufficient for postmortem review.
